diff: The address of the Multisig that has the Freezer Role is specified in [A.6.1.1.6.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2 - Freezer Multisig](841e629e-c887-48ec-8219-e0b1c86145d6).
summary: Add Avalanche Asset Recovery Address To Safe Harbor
description: Adds Avalanche's chain ID and Asset Recovery Address to the Safe Harbor list.
